positive: An intricate, symmetrical celestial botanical mandala pattern, featuring highly detailed elements like glowing lunar moth wings, intertwined vines, delicate crystalline structures, and stylized crescent moons. The composition must be perfectly centered and framed, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Use a sophisticated deep indigo and emerald teal color palette, accented by vibrant gold filigree highlights. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and cosmic bioluminescence, rendered with crisp, high-contrast lines and glowing internal illumination, resembling a vintage scientific illustration meets deep space nebula. Vector art quality, perfect symmetry, clean silhouette.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, text, watermark, signature, low detail, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, sketch, cartoon, photographic
